violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. - Foil covering many containers in walk-in cooler. Need to have proper lids.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - Cart holding the meat slicer in need of cleaning.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Large ice machine in need of cleaning. Splash guard collecting buildup.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as needed. - Kitchen equipment in need of cleaning. Door panels, sides, ect.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Hood in need of cleaning.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. - Forks and spoons in server line need to be inverted.

Backflow prevention. — --Plumbing system was not installed to preclude backflow of a solid, liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply system. - Spray nozzle for sink sits below floodplain located in dishwashing area. Needs to sit above floodplain to prevent backflow.
Toilet facilities. — --- Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Areas of the kitchen floor has torn and cracked linoleum making it an uncleanable surface.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed box of potatoes on floor in walk in cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food inside microwave. -Observed upright freezer needs to be defrosted.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed vent hood needs to be cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..)were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. -Observed kitchen floor has torn and cracked linoleum making it an uncleanable surface.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Observed gap under entrance to kitchen large enough for rodents and insects to enter.
